products.name: Trailblazer Hiking Boots
products.description: Waterproof full-grain leather hiking boots with Vibram outsole. Ankle support, breathable lining, ideal for rugged terrain.

products.name: Merino Wool Hiking Socks 3-Pack
products.description: Cushioned merino wool blend socks with arch support and moisture-wicking properties. Machine washable.

products.name: Alpine 2-Person Tent
products.description: 3-season freestanding tent with dual vestibules, taped seams, and aluminum poles. Sets up in under 5 minutes.

products.name: Summit Shell Rain Jacket
products.description: 3-layer Gore-Tex equivalent waterproof/breathable shell. Pit zips, helmet-compatible hood, packable into chest pocket.

products.name: 45L Expedition Backpack
products.description: Adjustable torso-length pack with hip belt, integrated rain cover, hydration sleeve, and multiple organization pockets.

products.name: Sleeping Bag 0°F Rated
products.description: 800-fill down sleeping bag rated to 0°F. YKK zipper, draft collar, mummy cut, stuff sack included.

products.name: Trekking Poles Set
products.description: Collapsible aluminum trekking poles with cork grips, adjustable wrist straps, and interchangeable tips.

products.name: Rechargeable Headlamp 400lm
products.description: USB-C rechargeable headlamp with 400 lumen max output, red night vision mode, and IPX4 water resistance. 50hr battery life.

products.name: Ultralight Water Filter
products.description: Hollow fiber inline water filter. Filters to 0.1 micron, no chemicals needed, filters up to 100,000 gallons.
